description_long: This is a classic bed frame with a high, ornate headboard and a lower footboard, both featuring decorative carved details. The frame is painted in a light, neutral color, giving it a clean and elegant appearance suitable for a variety of settings. The bed features a slatted base made of lighter wood, designed to support a mattress. The legs are gently curved, adding a touch of sophistication and traditional style. The overall construction appears sturdy, with visible joints and reinforcements at the corners. There is no mattress or bedding present, leaving the slatted support structure fully exposed.
description: A classic, light-colored bed frame with ornate headboard and footboard, featuring a visible slatted base and elegant curved legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tall, decorative headboard, lower footboard, and the full slatted base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the frame, the slatted base, and the profile of the headboard and footboard.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the headboard, displaying its curved top and panel detailing.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the slatted base and the side profile of the headboard and footboard.
